zh.Witton le Wear, Durham, England: 英國達勒姆維頓 勒 維亞爾
zh.Thornton Bridge, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾桑頓 布里奇
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander Neville II於大約1390年出生在英國越可爾桑頓 布里奇時，他的父親Sir Alexander Neville32歲，母親Margery29歲。他於1401年4月18日與Katherine Eure在英國達勒姆維頓 勒 維亞爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1457年6月15日在他的家鄉享年68歲，埋葬在英國越可爾約克。

zh-hans.Witton le Wear, Durham, England: 英国達勒姆維頓 勒 維亞爾
zh-hans.Thornton Bridge, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾桑頓 布里奇
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexander Neville II于大约1390年出生在英国越可爾桑頓 布里奇时，他的父亲Sir Alexander Neville32岁，母亲Margery29岁。他于1401年4月18日与Katherine Eure在英国達勒姆維頓 勒 維亞爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1457年6月15日在他的家乡享年68岁，埋葬在英国越可爾約克。

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander Neville II was born about 1390, in Thornton Bridge, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Alexander Neville, was 32 and his mother, Margery, was 29. He married Katherine Eure on 18 April 1401, in Witton le Wear, Durham, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 15 June 1457, in his hometown, at the age of 68, and was buried in York, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander Neville II est né environ 1390, à Thornton Bridge, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Alexander Neville, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Margery, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Eure le 18 avril 1401, à Witton le Wear, Durham, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 15 juin 1457, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à York, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander Neville II um 1390 in Thornton Bridge, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Alexander Neville 32 und seine Mutter Margery 29. Er hat am 18. April 1401 in Witton le Wear, Durham, England Katherine Eure geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 15. Juni 1457 im Alter von 68 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in York, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Neville II è nato il circa 1390 nel Thornton Bridge, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Alexander Neville, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Margery, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Katherine Eure il 18 aprile 1401, nel Witton le Wear, Durham, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 15 giugno 1457, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a York, Yorkshire, England.

ja.St. Mary Bishophill, York, Yorkshire, En: イギリスヨークシュアイアヨーク
ja.Thornton Bridge, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアソルントン ブリッジ
ja.lifeSummary: Alexander Neville IIが約1390年にイギリスヨークシュアイアソルントン ブリッジで生まれた時，父Sir Alexander Nevilleは32歳，母Margeryは29歳であった。1401年4月18日にイギリスダルハムウィットオン ル ウエアルでKatherine Eureと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1457年6月15日に故郷で68歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアヨークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander Neville II(이)가 대략 1390년 영국 요르크실르 토른턴 브리지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Alexander Neville(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1401년 4월 18일 영국 뒤람 윗튼 일 위르에서 Katherine Eure(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1457년 6월 15일 그의 고향에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 요르크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Neville II nasceu aproximadamente 1390, em Thornton Bridge, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Alexander Neville, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Margery, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Eure em 18 de abril de 1401, em Witton le Wear, Durham, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 15 de junho de 1457, em sua cidade natal, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander Neville II родился около 1390 г. в местности таурнтон бридж, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Alexander Neville было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Margery, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Eure 18 апреля 1401 г. в местности виттон л вир, дурам, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 15 июня 1457 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alexander Neville II nació aproximadamente 1390, en Thornton Bridge, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Alexander Neville, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Margery, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Katherine Eure el 18 de abril de 1401, en Witton le Wear, Durham, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 15 de junio de 1457, en su pueblo, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
